heading: Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
label: 170508 Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)17050836:2514 (1st sentence)., (1st sentence), .July 23, 1984Pub. L. 98–372, § 1598 Stat. 1241
